title: Toggle
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Toggle primitive preserving controlled pressed state, aria-pressed, data-pressed, disabled behavior, and keyboard activation through the local Button conventions.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native Base UI Toggle primitive preserving controlled pressed state, aria-pressed, data-pressed, disabled behavior, and keyboard activation through the local Button conventions.

registry.reason: Base UI Toggle reuses the local Base UI Button primitive for button, disabled, render, and keyboard semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema and Predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
